matching_rules.move: Showdown-style normalized move identity plus action kind
matching_rules.tera_move: same-side turn Tera event plus normalized move identity
matching_rules.forced_switch: switch species match; preserve forced metadata when available
matching_rules.pass_wait_team_preview: exclude, including turn-0 initial deployment switches
matching_rules.candidate_state: exact protocol/event prefix before observed action
matching_rules.active_species_moves: assign move reveals to chronologically active switch-detail species
matching_rules.unmatched: skip action-rank group; never inject chosen action

action_value.reason: public replays lack counterfactual outcomes for unchosen actions

excluded_state_rules: no reconstructed legal candidates for action-rank
replay-chosen action cannot be matched for action-rank
split_rule: battle-level split from diagnostic_300 before featurization
information_boundary: final outcome is label-only; features use replay prefix and existing documented own-side reconstruction assumption; no true hidden opponent team
